creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 164291
update firefox to version 43

Firefox 43 has been released: https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/43.0/releasenotes/
Security: lots - https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/known-vulnerabilities/firefox/#firefox43

As the bundled jemalloc has been updated to version 4.0, xpcshell crashed on install just like on DragonFly (backtraces show segfaults 1700 levels deep into the malloc stuff), I disabled jemalloc for now.
